name: /help explains the bot in plain language

payload.text:
ℹ️ How to use this bot:

1️⃣ Tap /start to open the menu
2️⃣ Get your referral link and share it
3️⃣ Earn $0.01 for each valid referral
4️⃣ Withdraw your earnings via USDT (TRC20)

Everything is button-driven — just tap to navigate!

name: the Help menu button shows the same help text
